label: CIS Safeguard 1.4
title: Use Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol (DHCP) Logging to Update Enterprise Asset Inventory

prose.en: Use DHCP logging on all DHCP servers or Internet Protocol (IP) address management tools to update the enterprise's asset inventory. Review and use logs to update the enterprise's asset inventory weekly, or more frequently.
DHCP logging is used on all DHCP servers or Internet Protocol (IP) address management tools to update the enterprise's asset inventory.
The logs are reviewed and used to update the enterprise's asset inventory weekly, or more frequently.
